sessions.title: Session 1. Strategic Vision and Foundations of Conscious Leadership

days.title: Day 1. Strategic Planning: From Vision to Results
items: Mission and key business priorities
Systems thinking
Strategic planning
Goal map and team accountability
Management tools for translating strategy into tactics
Team focus on achieving goals through collaboration

days.title: Day 2. Effective Leader. Management Without Pressure
items: Corporate culture and values as a management tool
From manager to leader. The hidden resource of a leader
Leader's emotional intelligence and team results
Managing team dynamics and engagement without big budgets and corporate events

sessions.title: Session 2. Personal Effectiveness and Team Dynamics

days.title: Day 3. Effective Leader. Personal and Team Effectiveness
items: Principles of a successful leader
Management cycle map
Algorithms for managing team and personal effectiveness
Tools for effective delegation
Time management for leaders

days.title: Day 4. Effective Team. Stages of Maturity
items: Team development stages: from a group to a high-performing team
Diagnosing the current stage of team development and transition plan
Methods for managing team dynamics and conflicts

sessions.title: Session 3. Long-Term Motivation and Resource State

days.title: Day 5. Effective Team. Motivation and Engagement
items: Motivation that works: managing through personal drivers
Conditions for personal and professional growth of employees
Productive hiring and proper dismissal methods
Retaining talent and reducing turnover without large budgets

days.title: Day 6. Resource State of the Leader and Team
items: Human physiology and performance
Managing physical, emotional and mental energy
Burnout prevention and motivation recovery methods
Quick recovery techniques without distraction from work
